rationale: Elec. Code §277.0023 governs supplementation of election petitions. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no operative overlap with petition-supplementing rules.
quote: Sec. 277.0023. SUPPLEMENTING PETITION. (a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), a petition may not be supplemented, modified, or amended on or after the date it is received by the authority with whom it is required to be filed unless expressly authorized by law.
_note: No conflict identified. The cited election code provision concerns petition procedures; the proposed tax code change concerns exemption amounts. Different subject matters with no intersection.
